MA20_5m.purpose: MTF bias filter — 5m trend direction must confirm 1m entry direction (trend-following only)

candle_rules.sort_order: ascending by time (oldest first, newest last) — enforced in getCandles()
candle_rules.forming_bar: candles[-1] is the FORMING (incomplete) bar — NEVER used for any signal
candle_rules.last_closed: candles[-2] is the last CLOSED bar — used as curr in entry/exit checks
candle_rules.prev_closed: candles[-3] is the bar before last closed — used as prev in entry checks
candle_rules.ma_input: MA20 and SMA200 computed over CLOSED bars only (forming bar excluded)
candle_rules.htf_bars: 5m candles: 25 bars fetched, [-1] forming excluded, [-2] is last closed 5m bar

bias_filter.secondary: 5m close vs 5m MA20 (MTF confirmation — trend entries only)
bias_filter.long_bias: 1m MA20 > SMA200 AND 5m close ≥ 5m-MA20 → LONG entries only
bias_filter.short_bias: 1m MA20 < SMA200 AND 5m close ≤ 5m-MA20 → SHORT entries only
bias_filter.neutral: 1m MA20 == SMA200 OR 5m disagrees with 1m → skip trend entry
bias_filter.reversal: MTF check skipped for reversal entries — counter-trend by design
bias_filter.purpose: Two-layer trend confirmation: 1m for signal, 5m for bias alignment

entry.long: SWING LONG: GREEN candle + prev RED + close ABOVE MA20 + within 0.5% + 1m MA20>SMA200 + 5m close≥5m-MA20 (MTF) + RSI<70 + signal fresh within 1.5 bars
entry.short: SWING SHORT: RED candle + prev GREEN + close BELOW MA20 + within 0.5% + 1m MA20<SMA200 + 5m close≤5m-MA20 (MTF) + RSI>30 + signal fresh within 1.5 bars
entry.order_type: MARKET — fills immediately at best available price

logic.step1_freshness: Max 2 candle closes after signal — entry valid on 1st or 2nd close only. 3rd close onwards = INVALID
logic.step2_bias_1m: 1m MA20 > SMA200 → LONG only | 1m MA20 < SMA200 → SHORT only | equal → skip
logic.step3_bias_5m: 5m close ≥ 5m-MA20 → bullish 5m (required for LONG) | 5m close ≤ 5m-MA20 → bearish 5m (required for SHORT)
logic.step5_reversal: curr GREEN + prev RED for LONG | curr RED + prev GREEN for SHORT
logic.step6_ma20: curr.close >= MA20 for LONG | curr.close <= MA20 for SHORT
logic.step7_proximity: |close - MA20| / MA20 <= 0.005 — must be within 0.5% of MA20, no chasing
logic.purpose: Tight MA20 bounce entries — fresh, close to MA20, dual-timeframe trend-aligned

exit.stop_loss: -3% unrealized PnL on margin — hard stop, checked every 5s, MARKET order
exit.take_profit: +8% unrealized PnL on margin — swing target (2.67:1 R:R vs -3% stop), MARKET order
exit.trailing_stop: activates at +4% PnL, trails 2% below peak — locks in swing gains, MARKET order

ma20_crossover.long: Close LONG: curr.close < MA20 AND prev.close >= prevMA20 (crossed below MA20)
ma20_crossover.short: Close SHORT: curr.close > MA20 AND prev.close <= prevMA20 (crossed above MA20)
ma20_crossover.note: NO freshness guard — exits always fire regardless of candle age

exit.order_type: MARKET — fills immediately at best available price
exit.double_exit_guard: closingPositions Set prevents re-sending close order while one is in-flight

logic.freshness: NONE on exits — exits must never be blocked by age
logic.ma_consistency: currMA and prevMA both computed from closed bars at their respective positions
logic.pnl_method_B: livePrice delta * leverage (fallback when BingX fields unavailable)
logic.tracking: Logs: price%, margin PnL%, USD PnL, daily total, W/L ratio
logic.purpose: Priority exits: stop → take-profit → trail → MA20. Never block an exit.

ai_agent.description: Bot thinks and executes like an AI agent — multi-indicator confluence, adaptive sizing, smart re-entry logic
ai_agent.mtf_confirmation: 5m MA20 bias must align with 1m entry direction (trend-following only)
ai_agent.confluence_scoring: max 10pts: distance(1-3) + body(1-3) + trend-gap(1-2) + MTF-confirm(+1) + RSI-zone(+1)
ai_agent.smart_reentry: 5-min cooldown per symbol after stop-loss fires — no revenge trades
ai_agent.reversal_mtf_exempt: Counter-trend reversals skip MTF check (they ARE the counter-trend move)

consolidation_filter.description: DISABLED — MA20 + SMA200 + 5m MTF bias is sufficient filter

volume_filter.description: DISABLED for trend entries — volume required for reversal entries only (≥2x)

position_sizing.description: Risk 1% of balance per trade, max $500 margin, 5x leverage, size scaled by confluence score

limits.description: Max 20 open, 500/day | fetch:200ms between symbols | order:500ms after placement | scan/exit:5s | stop:-3% TP:+8% trail:+4%→-2%

reversal_entry.description: Counter-trend entries allowed when volume confirms a possible reversal. MTF check skipped — reversals ARE counter-trend by design.
reversal_entry.long_in_short_bias: 1m MA20 < SMA200 (downtrend) + GREEN candle + prev RED + close ≥ MA20 + within 0.5% + RSI<70 + vol ≥ 2x prior avg → LONG reversal
reversal_entry.short_in_long_bias: 1m MA20 > SMA200 (uptrend)   + RED  candle + prev GREEN + close ≤ MA20 + within 0.5% + RSI>30 + vol ≥ 2x prior avg → SHORT reversal
reversal_entry.volume_baseline: 20-bar avg computed over CLOSED bars PRIOR to curr (excludes forming bar AND curr bar)
reversal_entry.mtf_check: SKIPPED — counter-trend entries are exempt from 5m MTF confirmation
reversal_entry.note: Reversal entries use 50% normal size and -1.5% stop (tighter) vs trend entries at full size and -3% stop

risk_management.description: Swing R:R — Take profit +8% | Trail activates +4% trailing 2% | Stop -3% | 5-min cooldown after stop-loss | Daily target $200 (tracking only, no halt) | Bot runs 24/7 | Circuit breaker: pause 30min if WR < 40% after 10+ trades

deployment.process: bot.js (CONSOLIDATED SWING TRADER BOT — single process, 100% of trading)

persistence.description: State lives in Railway environment — restarts pick up from BingX live positions

profitability_tracking.daily_pnl: Realized P&L per trade ($) + daily running total
profitability_tracking.display_format: icon EXIT SIDE SYMBOL price:X% margin:Y% | PnL: $Z | Daily: $D | W/L: N/M (R%)
profitability_tracking.purpose: Real-time profitability visibility in Railway logs

performance.scan_latency: ~4-5s per full watchlist scan (1m+5m candles fetched in parallel)
performance.exit_poll_passes: 2-pass: Pass1=stop/TP/trail from position data (0 extra API calls), Pass2=parallel MA20 fetch for crossover check only
performance.livePrice_calls: on-demand only — fetched once when a stop/TP/trail exit condition is actually met
performance.slot_fill: immediate — slot-fill scan triggered 1.5s after any successful exit

debug.log_level: critical events only (entries, exits, stop-losses, take-profits, trail-stops, cooldowns, scan summaries)
debug.purpose: Minimize Railway log bloat while retaining all actionable info

changelog.v3.5: Scalper → Swing Trader: MTF 5m MA20 bias layer for trend entries, TP +6%→+8%, trail activates +3%→+4%, 5-min stop-loss cooldown per symbol (no revenge trades), enhanced signal scoring max 10pts (MTF+RSI-zone bonuses), all 'scalper' references renamed to 'swing trader'
changelog.v3.4: Slot-fill scan: scheduleFillScan() fires 1.5s after any successful exit so freed slots are filled immediately (was waiting up to 5s for next interval). scanEntry tagged with reason='slot-fill' for log clarity.
changelog.v3.3: 5-bug audit: volAvg excludes curr bar (slice(0,-2)), fetchCandlesBatch 5 concurrent workers (scan 20s→4s), 2-pass pollExits, livePrice on-demand only, getCandles 1-retry with 300ms wait
changelog.v3.2: Counter-trend reversal entries: LONG in short-bias + SHORT in long-bias, gated by ≥2x volume surge. 50% size, -1.5% stop, reversalPositions tracker
changelog.v3.1: 8-bug fix: dynamic qty precision, double-exit guard, livePrice for method A, checkDailyReset in pollExits, TDZ cleanup, removed dead DAILY_LOSS_LIM, MAX_DAILY log, closingPositions daily clear
changelog.v3.0: Hedge fund edition: take-profit +6%, trailing stop +3%/−2%, circuit breaker, RSI filter, signal scoring, daily target tracking
changelog.v2.1: 2-candle freshness window, MA20 proximity 0.5%, SMA200 bias, blacklist additions
changelog.v2.0: SMA200 trend bias, stop-loss on margin PnL, inverted signal fix, late entry fix
